[Rerun Pick-Up Recruitment Preview]

A Rerun Pick-Up Recruitment will begin on 11/21 (Tue)!
Pick-Up Student: 3★ Hifumi (Swimsuit)

Pick-Up Recruitment Schedule: 11/21 (Tue) 2:00 AM – 11/28 (Tue) 1:59 AM (UTC)
